series_metadata.series_description: Record series consists of all records that deputy registrars maintain in accordance with section D of the Deputy Registrar Manual. These include End of Day Reports, consignment Invoices (BMV1511), Missing Affidavits (BMV5702), Chargeable and Non-Chargeable Inventories, Error Correction Worksheet (BMV5716), correspondence with BMV Revenue Mangement section, Broadcasts, Evaluations, Work schedule, contracts, motor voter transmission forms, Abstract file, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain three years, then destroy, Paper: Recycle
